category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator and medical/surgical mask compliance comparison: China domestic mask classifications to India market routes under BIS standards, CDSCO Medical Device Rules 2017, import licence, and labelling controls.

title.en: China-to-India PPE Respirator and Mask Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator and mask documentation against India market requirements, including BIS IS 9473 respirator standards, CDSCO regulation of medical and surgical masks under the Medical Device Rules 2017, import licence controls, and labelling requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器和口罩文件与印度市场要求对照，涵盖BIS IS 9473呼吸器标准、CDSCO依据《2017年医疗器械规则》对医用和外科口罩的监管、进口许可证以及标签要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器和口罩文件與印度市場要求對照，涵蓋BIS IS 9473呼吸器標準、CDSCO依據《2017年醫療器械規則》對醫用和外科口罩的監管、進口許可證以及標籤要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BIS licence determination, CDSCO approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Indian law, CDSCO notifications, BIS conformity assessment requirements, and destination-state enforcement practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BIS许可证判定、CDSCO批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核实现行印度法律、CDSCO通知、BIS合格评定要求以及目的地邦执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BIS許可證判定、CDSCO批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行印度法律、CDSCO通知、BIS合格評定要求以及目的地邦執法實踐。

answer_first.en: India separates non-medical respirator standards and medical-device mask regulation by intended use. IS 9473 is a BIS respirator standard and should be treated as a voluntary presumption route unless a current Indian legal order makes a specific product category compulsory. Medical and surgical masks are regulated by CDSCO under the Medical Device Rules 2017; imported notified medical devices require an Indian Authorized Agent and import licence route. English labelling, importer or authorized-agent details, batch traceability, dates, storage, warnings, and intended-use claims must be India-market specific.
answer_first.zh: 印度按预期用途区分非医用呼吸器标准与医疗器械口罩监管。IS 9473是BIS呼吸器标准，除非现行印度法律命令将特定产品类别列为强制，否则应按自愿性推定路径处理。医用和外科口罩由CDSCO依据《2017年医疗器械规则》监管；进口已通知医疗器械需要印度授权代理商和进口许可证路径。英文标签、进口商或授权代理商信息、批次追溯、日期、储存、警告及预期用途声明均须面向印度市场。
answer_first.zht: 印度按預期用途區分非醫用呼吸器標準與醫療器械口罩監管。IS 9473是BIS呼吸器標準，除非現行印度法律命令將特定產品類別列為強制，否則應按自願性推定路徑處理。醫用和外科口罩由CDSCO依據《2017年醫療器械規則》監管；進口已通知醫療器械需要印度授權代理商和進口許可證路徑。英文標籤、進口商或授權代理商信息、批次追溯、日期、儲存、警告及預期用途聲明均須面向印度市場。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. BIS and CDSCO official URLs are the primary sources for India. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
